DP.237.0000:
Grunt 1: Enough arguing!
Hand over that sweet Honey!\f
DP.237.0001:
Grunt 2: Do as we say!
Team Galactic will have that Honey!\f
We must have it to attract Pokémon
in great numbers!\f
DP.237.0002:
Grunt 1: Hey! This kid is a witness!
What’ll we do?\f
DP.237.0003:
Grunt 2: We don’t need the brat
running off to get help...\f
The solution’s simple!
We ensure the brat stays quiet!\f
DP.237.0004:
Grunt 1: This is so lame...
They’re going to dock my pay!\f
DP.237.0005:
Grunt 2: I’m up next!
Heheheh...\f
Battling you right after my cohort
weakened you gives me the edge!\f
DP.237.0006:
Grunt 1: This brat’s tough!
Like, really, really tough!\f
Tougher than I can put into words,
and I know a lot of words!\f
We’re done for here... Let’s get back
to the Valley Windworks.\f
DP.237.0007:
Oh, what’s this thing?
They seem to have forgotten it...\f
It’s a Works Key...
It must be for the Valley Windworks!\f
It’s of no use to me.
You may as well have it.\f
DP.237.0008:
Thank you!
You surely saved me.\f
Those goons were trying to rob me
of my sweet, sweet Honey.\f
They sure were weird, though.
You saw how they were dressed.\f
What they were saying didn’t make
a whole lot of sense, either.\f
Oh! I need to thank you!
Will you take this as my thanks?\f
DP.237.0009:
If you slather that Honey on
a sweet-smelling tree, it might\r
attract Pokémon.
DP.237.0010:
Honey can attract Pokémon if it’s
slathered on a tree and left a while.\f
Would you like to buy some Honey
for a mere $100?
DP.237.0012:
Oopsy!
You can’t hold any more.
DP.237.0013:
Oopsy!
You don’t have enough money.
